name: Mail Protocol C2 Communication
description: Detects unusual SMTP/IMAP/POP3 traffic that may indicate C2 via mail protocols
query:
// Detect mail protocol abuse for C2
// Trigger on non-mail-server hosts making SMTP connections
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port = 25
  or destination_port = 587
  or destination_port = 993
  and direction = "outbound"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 20
within 600 seconds
